duplicate_blocks.rules: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

duplicate_blocks.selector:
details.management-menu summary::-webkit-details-marker, .languages-wrapper.hidden, .floating-vitality-orbs.is-dragging::-webkit-scrollbar, summary::-webkit-details-marker, .hidden-checkbox, .lang-checkbox, 
#dice-roller-widget .dice-widget-mobile-stats, body.on-test-page #dice-roller-widget .dice-widget-mobile-stats, body.on-test-page #combat-log-widget, .hidden, #toggle-dice-btn .dice-icon, body.on-test-page #toggle-dice-btn .chevron-icon, .condition-item input, #combat-log-list::-webkit-scrollbar, 
body.on-test-page .global-header, body.on-test-page .site-footer, 
body.tour-active .top-mobile-hud, body.tour-active .floating-vitality-orbs, body.tour-active .combat-utilities-wrapper, body.tour-active #toggle-dice-btn, .top-mobile-hud:not(.expanded) .stat-confirm-bar

body.has-available-points .floating-vitality-orbs.expanded .hud-header-toggles, body.has-available-points .expanded-points-tracker, body.on-test-page .top-mobile-hud, body.on-test-page.char-sheet-active .combat-utilities-wrapper, body.on-test-page .combat-utilities-wrapper, body.on-test-page.char-sheet-active #toggle-dice-btn, body.on-test-page #toggle-dice-btn

duplicate_blocks.rules: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
